data.title: [dso shim]: Host project session cannot find dso CLI -> orchestrator uses full plugin cache path or fails
data.description: In a host project session, the 'dso' command is not on PATH. The agent attempts 'dso ticket list' and gets 'command not found: dso'. Root cause: the host project does not have .claude/scripts/dso shim present, or it is not on PATH. The session eventually discovers the shim at the plugin cache path (/Users/.../plugins/marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra/.claude/scripts/dso) and uses the full path — which is the WRONG path (see CLAUDE.md Never-Do rule: never reference plugin cache directly). The .tickets-tracker directory was also absent from the worktree (it exists on the orphan 'tickets' branch). Fix: CLAUDE.md for host projects must explicitly document that .claude/scripts/dso must be present and that the tickets branch must be checked out before sprinting.
